name: Bromelain
summary: Decision-ready summary: Bromelain is best framed for sinus inflammation context; post-exercise soreness context; protein digestion support; safety screen: pineapple allergy; anticoagulants; planned surgery.
description: Bromelain is a proteolytic mixture with mechanistic interest in inflammatory mediators and digestion support; evidence strength varies by outcome.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v8.2: A 12-week knee OA pilot trial used 800 mg/day but did not show significant WOMAC superiority vs placebo.
claimMap.notes: v8.2: A 12-week knee OA pilot trial used 800 mg/day but did not show significant WOMAC superiority vs placebo.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 800 mg/day studied in knee osteoarthritis pilot trial
